description: A Flutter ChangeNotifier class that manages the playback state of a tale, including play/pause toggling, seeking, and timing logic. It interacts with a TaleRepository to record listens.

classes.name: PlayerController
classes.description: A controller for managing the playback state of a Tale, providing methods to control playback, seek position, and notify listeners of state changes.

methods.name: PlayerController
methods.description: Constructor for PlayerController, requiring a TaleRepository instance.

methods.name: setCurrent
methods.description: Sets the current Tale, resets playback state, and cancels any ongoing timer.

methods.name: togglePlay
methods.description: Toggles between playing and paused states; starts or cancels the internal timer accordingly.

methods.name: seekTo
methods.description: Seeks the playback position to a specified number of seconds, clamped within the needful range.

methods.name: _startTimer
methods.description: Internal method to start a periodic timer that updates playback position and handles end of playback.

methods.name: _maybeRecordListen
methods.description: Records a listen event for the current Tale only once.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up resources by cancelling the timer and calling the superclass dispose method.
